api_payload.title: CVE-2026-9453 - FoundDream miniclawd SkillsLoader skills-loader.ts which command injection

detection_pack.sigma:
title: APEX - CVE-2026-9453 - FoundDream miniclawd SkillsLoader skills-loa — Command Injection
id: apex-cmdinj-0fdf7340
status: experimental
description: |
  Detects OS command injection exploitation for CVE-2026-9453. Covers shell metacharacter injection, command chaining, and subshell execution via user-controlled input fields.
  Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v161.0
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9453
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/05/25
tags:
    - attack.execution
    - attack.t1059
    - attack.t1190
logsource:
  category: webserver
detection:
  shell_metacharacters:
    cs-uri-query|contains:
      - '|bash'
      - '|sh'
      - ';bash'
      - ';id;'
      - ';whoami'
      - '$(id)'
      - '$(whoami)'
      - '`id`'
      - '`whoami`'
      - '%7c bash'
      - '%7c id'
      - '|/bin/bash'
  encoded_command_injection:
    cs-uri-query|contains:
      - '%7c%62%61%73%68'
      - '%3b%62%61%73%68'
      - '%60%69%64%60'
  powershell_injection:
    cs-uri-query|contains:
      - 'powershell.exe'
      - 'powershell -'
      - 'cmd.exe /c'
      - 'cmd /c'
      - '&&dir'
      - '||dir'
      - '&&type '
  condition: shell_metacharacters or encoded_command_injection or powershell_injection
falsepositives:
  - URL parameters that legitimately contain pipe characters for filtering
  - Shell script documentation in URL parameters
level: critical
detection_pack.spl:
| comment "CVE-2026-9453 - FoundDream miniclawd SkillsLoader skills-loa | CVE-2026-9453 | APEX v161.0"

index=network OR index=proxy earliest=-24h
| eval threat_match = if(match(_raw, "(?i)(2d65665046e2222eeea76cafc8570ed546a8c125\|https://cvefeed\.io/vuln/detail/CVE\-2026\-9453\|cstecgi\.cgi\|requires\.bins\|skills\-loader\.ts)"), 1, 0)
| where threat_match=1
| eval rule="APEX-CVE-2026-9453", severity="HIGH"
| stats count min(_time) as first_seen max(_time) as last_seen by src_ip, dest_host, rule, severity
| convert timeformat="%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ" ctime(first_seen) ctime(last_seen)
| sort -count
detection_pack.yara:
rule APEX_CVE_2026_9453__COMMAND_INJECTION {
    meta:
        description   = "APEX detection: CVE-2026-9453 - FoundDream miniclawd SkillsLoader skills-loader.ts whi"
        cve           = "CVE-2026-9453"
        vuln_class    = "COMMAND_INJECTION"
        author        = "CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v161.0"
        date          = "2026-05-25"
        reference     = "https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com"
        severity      = "high"
        mitre_attack  = "T1059, T1190"
    strings:
        $ioc_0 = "2d65665046e2222eeea76cafc8570ed546a8c125" ascii wide nocase  // IOC: 2d65665046e2222eeea76cafc8570ed546a8c125
        $ioc_1 = "https://cvefeed.io/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9453" ascii wide nocase  // IOC: https://cvefeed.io/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-
        $ioc_2 = "cstecgi.cgi" ascii wide nocase  // IOC: cstecgi.cgi
        $ioc_3 = "requires.bins" ascii wide nocase  // IOC: requires.bins
    condition:
        any of ($ioc_*)
}
detection_pack.elastic_lucene:
// Elastic Lucene: intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a
("<indicator>") AND @timestamp:[now-30d TO now]
detection_pack.qradar_aql:
/* QRadar AQL: CVE-2026-9453 - FoundDream miniclawd SkillsLoader skills-loa | intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a */
SELECT DATEFORMAT(devicetime,'YYYY-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS EventTime,
  sourceip, destinationip, username, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS Source,
  QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName, 'intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a' AS AdvisoryID
FROM events WHERE category ILIKE '%web%'
WHERE (TEXT SEARCH '<indicator>')
AND devicetime > (NOW() - 2592000)
ORDER BY devicetime DESC LIMIT 10000
START '30 days ago' STOP 'now'
detection_pack.chronicle_yaral:
// Chronicle YARA-L: CVE-2026-9453 - FoundDream miniclawd SkillsLoader skills-loa
rule apex_intel__11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5 {
  meta:
    description = "CVE-2026-9453 - FoundDream miniclawd SkillsLoader skills-loader.ts which command"
    author = "CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX"
    severity = "CRITICAL"
    attack_techniques = "TT1059 | TT1190"
  events:
  $e.metadata.event_type = "NETWORK_CONNECTION"
  condition:
    $e
}
detection_pack.crowdstrike:
// CrowdStrike NG-SIEM: CVE-2026-9453 - FoundDream miniclawd SkillsLoader skills-loa
#type=ProcessRollup2 | head 10000
| search (CommandHistory contains "<indicator>")
| eval hunt_id="intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a"
| stats count by HostName, FileName, CommandLine
detection_pack.sentinelone:
// SentinelOne Power Query: CVE-2026-9453 - FoundDream miniclawd SkillsLoader skills-loa
EventType = 'Process Creation' AND
(ProcessCmd Contains "<indicator>")
| columns SrcProcName, SrcProcCmdLine, AgentComputerName, SrcProcUser
detection_pack.falco:
- rule: APEX - CVE-2026-9453 - FoundDream miniclawd SkillsLoader skills-loa
  desc: intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a - TT1059 | TT1190
  condition: spawned_process and (proc.cmdline contains "<indicator>")
  output: "APEX Alert: %proc.name %proc.cmdline"
  priority: CRITICAL
  tags: [apex, TT1059, TT1190]
detection_pack.osquery:
-- OSQuery: CVE-2026-9453 - FoundDream miniclawd SkillsLoader skills-loa | intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a
SELECT pid, name, cmdline, path, parent, uid
FROM processes
WHERE (cmdline LIKE '%indicator%');

retro_hunt.spl_splunk:
| comment "RETRO-HUNT: intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a | CVE-2026-9453 - FoundDream miniclawd SkillsLoader skills-loa | Techniques: T1190 T1059"
index=* earliest=-90d latest=now
(
    ("<ip_indicator>")
    OR ("cstecgi.cgi" OR "requires.bins")
    OR ("2d65665046e2222eeea76cafc8570ed546a8c125")
)
| eval hunt_advisory="intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a"
| eval hunt_techniques="T1190 T1059"
| eval hunt_ts=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
| eval indicator_type=case(
    match(_raw, "(x.x.x.x"), "IP",
    match(_raw, "(cstecgi.cgi|requires.bins"), "Domain",
    match(_raw, "(2d65665046e2222eeea76cafc8570ed546a8c125"), "Hash",
    1==1, "Unknown"
  )
| stats count AS hits,
    min(_time) AS first_seen,
    max(_time) AS last_seen,
    dc(host) AS affected_hosts,
    values(sourcetype) AS sources
    BY hunt_advisory, indicator_type, host
| where hits > 0
| eval first_seen=strftime(first_seen,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),
       last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
| sort - hits
retro_hunt.qradar_aql:
/* RETRO-HUNT AQL: intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a | Lookback: 90d */
SELECT
    DATEFORMAT(devicetime,'YYYY-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS EventTime,
    sourceip, destinationip, destinationhostname,
    username, "Application", "Event Category",
    LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS LogSource,
    QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName,
    'intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a' AS HuntAdvisoryID
FROM events
WHERE (
    destinationip IN ('<ip>')
    OR sourceip IN ('<ip>')
    OR destinationhostname IN ('cstecgi.cgi', 'requires.bins')
    OR LOOKUPHOSTNAME(destinationip) IN ('cstecgi.cgi', 'requires.bins')
)
AND devicetime > (NOW() - 7776000)
ORDER BY devicetime DESC
LIMIT 10000
START '90d ago'
STOP 'now'
retro_hunt.crowdstrike_eql:
/* RETRO-HUNT CrowdStrike Event Query: intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a | Techniques: T1190, T1059 */
#type=ProcessRollup2 | head 1000
| eval hunt_id="intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a"
| search (sha256 = "2d65665046e2222eeea76cafc8570ed546a8c125") OR (DomainName = "cstecgi.cgi" or DomainName = "requires.bins")
| stats count by HostName, FileName, CommandLine, UserSid, TimeStamp
| sort count desc
retro_hunt.generic_sql:
/* RETRO-HUNT Generic SQL: intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a | Lookback: 90d */
/* Compatible with: Splunk Data Lake, Snowflake, BigQuery, Azure Data Explorer */
SELECT
    event_timestamp,
    host_name,
    source_ip,
    destination_ip,
    destination_domain,
    file_hash_sha256,
    process_name,
    process_command_line,
    user_name,
    'intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a' AS hunt_advisory_id
FROM security_events
WHERE event_timestamp > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '90 days'
  AND (
    destination_ip IN ('<ip>')
    OR source_ip IN ('<ip>')
    OR destination_domain IN ('cstecgi.cgi', 'requires.bins')
    OR file_hash_sha256 IN ('2d65665046e2222eeea76cafc8570ed546a8c125')
  )
ORDER BY event_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 50000;

normalized_rules.kql:
// Sentinel Rule: CVE-2026-9453 - FoundDream miniclawd SkillsLoader skills-loa | intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a | Techniques: TT1059 | TT1190
// Severity: critical
DeviceNetworkEvents | union W3CIISLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("<indicator>")

          InitiatingProcessFileName, ProcessCommandLine
| extend AdvisoryID="intel--11f3d939c15d69eba10ccb5a", Techniques="TT1059 | TT1190"
